prompt: I'm doing a dependency cleanup on a TypeScript project located at /Users/admin/Desktop/DD2/DevDigest/.claude/skills/dependency-checker-workspace/fixtures/mini-repo . Treat THAT directory as the repository root (ignore the outer repo it happens to sit inside). It has four packages: server/, client/, reviewer-core/, and e2e/. Give me a full dependency audit: what depends on what (a graph is welcome), a size breakdown, and every problem worth fixing, prioritized by severity with a concrete recommended action for each.

assertions.text: Output contains a Mermaid dependency graph (```mermaid ... flowchart)
Findings carry explicit severity tiers (P0/P1/P2/Info or equivalent High/Med/Low ranking)
Detects the circular dependency between server (@devdigest/api) and reviewer-core
Detects client reaching into server internals via relative import ../../../server/src/db/schema
Detects zod version drift (server ^3.x vs client ^4.x)

Detects eslint declared under dependencies (should be devDependencies) in server
Notes reviewer-core has zero runtime dependencies (Info)
